## Validation

## Integrity Checklist

- [ ] No private project memory, datasets, credentials, or manuscript-confidential content are committed.
- [ ] Journal compliance remains `VERIFIED` only with current official or user-provided guidance.
- [ ] External data use is provenance-gated.
- [ ] Dependency planning remains plan-only and does not auto-install packages.
- [ ] New public commands or artifacts are reflected in `SKILL.md`, `manifest.json`, docs, and validation.
